content: Self-Refine’s iterative single-model feedback loop can be augmented by LLM self-reflection mechanisms that draw on multiple inconsistent solving perspectives, creating a two-layer self-improvement structure where the outer iteration refines outputs and the inner reflection generates diverse critical feedback to avoid local optimization traps. This structure retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision, while addressing the common limitation of single-perspective self-feedback being too narrow to catch hidden flaws.
